post_install: powershell -Command "`$enginesDir = (openssl version -e) -replace 'ENGINESDIR: \"(.*)\"', '`$1'; if (-not (Test-Path `$enginesDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path `$enginesDir -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item '$dir\pkcs11.dll' -Destination `$enginesDir -Force; if (`$?) { Write-Host \"PKCS#11 engine installed to: `$enginesDir\" -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Error 'Failed to install PKCS#11 engine'; exit 1 }"
pre_uninstall: powershell -Command "`$enginesDir = (openssl version -e) -replace 'ENGINESDIR: \"(.*)\"', '`$1'; `$pkcs11Path = Join-Path `$enginesDir 'pkcs11.dll'; if (Test-Path `$pkcs11Path) { Remove-Item `$pkcs11Path -Force; if (`$?) { Write-Host \"PKCS#11 engine removed from: `$enginesDir\" -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Error 'Failed to remove PKCS#11 engine'; exit 1 } } else { Write-Host \"PKCS#11 engine not found in: `$enginesDir\" -ForegroundColor Yellow }"
notes: To (re-)install the PKCS#11 engine to the OpenSSL engines directory, run:
